# AfriVid Studio - Africa's First AI Video Creation Platform
# https://afrivid.studio

## About
AfriVid Studio is Africa's first AI-powered video creation platform. It allows anyone to create, edit, translate and publish professional videos in minutes — no skills or equipment needed. Built in Kigali, Rwanda by Regan Ayiecho.

## What AfriVid Does
- AI Video Creator: Type a topic, AfriVid writes the script, generates voice, builds slides and exports a complete MP4
- AI Video Editor: Viral clips, highlight reels, silence removal, noise reduction, voice translation to African languages
- Tutorial Maker: Create tutorial videos with concept slides or browser demo recording
- Slides Generator: Generate professional presentation slides from any topic
- Photo Editor: Edit photos, remove backgrounds, apply African flag overlays
- Design Studio: Create posters, flyers, certificates, logos and social media graphics
- Voice Translation: Dub any video into Swahili, Yoruba, Hausa, French, Arabic and Portuguese

## Key Facts
- Free during beta (3 videos/month free, Pro at $5/month)
- Supports 6 African languages natively
- Hosted on Google Cloud in Africa (Johannesburg)
- Direct YouTube upload from the platform
- No installation required — runs in any browser
